headings.style: Massive, oversized, sometimes cropped off-screen, italic accents on single words ('Timeless Art' museum poster energy)

textures: Subtle paper grain overlay on cream sections (mix-blend-multiply).
Faint topographic contour lines drifting in the background.
borders: Thin gold-line borders (#D4AF37) for oil painting frames.
Acid volt green (#D6FF3D) 1px solid borders for active interactive elements and live states.
glitch_effects: RGB-split and pixel-sort on failed passwords and painting fragments.

motion.scroll: GSAP ScrollTrigger for infinite scroll loop, Lenis for momentum-based smooth scroll.
motion.cursor: Custom volt (#D6FF3D) cursor with a delayed trailing ring, expanding and showing contextual labels (e.g., 'RUN', 'DRAG') over interactive elements.
motion.interactive: Magnetic buttons (attract cursor on hover), flip-clock/odometer digit rolls for live metrics.

layouts.spacing_system: Extremely generous (Tailwind p-8, p-16, p-24, p-32). Tension created by overlapping elements.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment. Museum-style asymmetric layouts mixing wide panoramas and strict grid constraints for data.

magnetic_button.description: Button that subtly snaps to the user's cursor on hover.
magnetic_button.styles: JetBrains Mono uppercase, volt (#D6FF3D) background on hover, ink (#0A0A08) text on hover. Otherwise transparent with volt border.

museum_card.description: Used for personas and saved strategies.
museum_card.styles: Cream (#EDE6D6) background, ink (#0A0A08) text, subtle noise overlay, framed with a thin dark umber border or gold line.

volt_frame.styles: Sharp 1px solid #D6FF3D border, #0A0A08 background, glowing drop shadow. No border radius.

odometer_digit.styles: Vertical sliding digit animation, monospaced, volt text.

painting_frame.styles: Deep umber (#4A4636) outer thick frame, thin gold (#D4AF37) inner border, drop-shadow-2xl.

sse_console.styles: Monaco/JetBrains Mono font, ink background, volt text, uppercase, fast scrolling, glowing text-shadow.

run_config_panel.styles: Dense layout, uppercase labels, slider inputs with volt thumbs, active chips with volt backgrounds.

chart_color_conventions.tooltip: Volt border, Ink background, JetBrains Mono text

section_blueprint.name: Access Gate
section_blueprint.description: Classical portrait with eyes covered by a volt censor bar. Password field styled like a museum placard. Wrong password shakes and applies RGB split/glitch to the painting.

section_blueprint.name: S1 Hero
section_blueprint.description: Giant serif heading 'GD NEXUS', subhead 'STRATEGY · CAPITAL · MACHINE'. Live status chips for backend/Ollama/Data. Features a painting + rotating wireframe dome.

section_blueprint.name: S2 The Council
section_blueprint.description: Horizontal pinned scroll of 10 persona portrait cards. Magnetic 'SUMMON THE COUNCIL' button. Live SSE console showing persona reasoning, graveyard (failures), and survivors with odometer metrics.

section_blueprint.name: S3 The Forge
section_blueprint.description: Monaco code editor with volt syntax highlighting. Race-engineering run-config panel (symbol, timeframe chips, leverage slider, etc.). Equity/drawdown charts and trades table.

section_blueprint.name: S4 The Vault
section_blueprint.description: Gallery wall of saved strategy plaques (museum-style). Magnetic buttons for LOAD/DELETE/RUN.

section_blueprint.name: S5 The Treasury
section_blueprint.description: Holdings editor with a sum-to-100% volt progress bar. Correlation matrix rendered as an engraved heatmap. Before/after weight bars morphing, and fusion portfolio backtest chart.

section_blueprint.name: S6 Epilogue
section_blueprint.description: Full-bleed dark section with a single serif line: 'The market is a museum. Everything here has happened before.' Initiates seamless GSAP loop back to S1 Hero.

image_urls.description: Vermeer - Girl with a Pearl Earring
Caravaggio - David with the Head of Goliath
Van Eyck - Portrait of a Man
Rembrandt - Old Man with a Gold Chain

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. #D6FF3D (Volt) is ONLY for interactive states, live metrics, and active cursors.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling globally.
Use GSAP ScrollTrigger to pin the Council section horizontally and to create the seamless Epilogue -> Hero loop.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk. The prompt asks for JetBrains Mono for data/UI elements. Strictly enforce JetBrains Mono for all monospaced tech typography.
Apply the paper grain overlay (SVG filter or CSS noise background) to cream (#EDE6D6) containers.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
DO NOT use clear transparent backgrounds for UI components covering the imagery—use solid #0A0A08 or #EDE6D6 backgrounds to ensure text readability.
Implement the glitch effect using CSS keyframes and text-shadow (for RGB split) combined with repeating-linear-gradient for scan lines.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural creative layouts, reserving Shadcn UI for complex interactives (slider, dropdowns) heavily restyled to remove generic look.
The codebase uses React (.jsx files, NO TYPESCRIPT). Ensure all implementation instructions use standard JS.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Ensure the Volt Cursor interacts dynamically with links/buttons (e.g., scaling up, showing 'VIEW' text inside the ring).
No purple/violet gradients allowed. Stick to Ink, Cream, Umber, Olive, and Volt.
